name: A4988 Stepper Driver
notes: RESET and SLEEP must be tied high for normal operation

electrical_constraints.message: RESET must be tied HIGH (to VDD) for normal operation
SLEEP must be tied HIGH (to VDD) for normal operation

name: DRV8825 Stepper Driver
notes: RESET and SLEEP must be tied high for normal operation

electrical_constraints.message: RESET must be tied HIGH (to VDD) for normal operation
SLEEP must be tied HIGH (to VDD) for normal operation

name: L298N Dual Motor Driver
notes: ENA and ENB should be driven with PWM for speed control

name: Arduino Mega 2560
notes: D20 is SDA, D21 is SCL

name: Arduino Uno R3
notes: A4 is SDA, A5 is SCL

name: ESP32 DevKit V1
notes: 3.3V Logic. D21 is SDA, D22 is SCL by default.

name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Sensor
notes: Requires 5V. Use voltage divider on Echo if connecting to 3.3V MCU.

name: MPU6050 IMU
notes: I2C interface. AD0 sets address (low=0x68, high=0x69).

electrical_constraints.message: AD0 should connect to GND or VCC for I2C address selection

name: TB6612FNG Dual Motor Driver
notes: STBY must be high for motors to run.

electrical_constraints.message: STBY must connect to VCC or MCU GPIO for normal operation

name: PCA9685 16-Channel PWM
notes: I2C controlled. V+ is for servo power.

name: HC-05 Bluetooth Module
notes: RXD requires voltage divider if connected to 5V MCU.

electrical_constraints.message: EN is active-low, should connect to GND or MCU GPIO
